subcodes.first_line: O Shoghi! According to the letters from the Holy Land, thou art sheltered and preserved beneath God's protection, and this is the cause of joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شوقی حق از قرار تحریرات ارض مقصود در پناه حق محفوظ و مصونید و این سبب سرور
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for protection
